name_en: Upgraded Version ⚠️ M83532 Light Blue Denim Chain Shoulder Bag. The Liv Pochette re-adopts bleached and stonewashed Monogram denim, featuring a vintage look and a summer vibe. This small bag is designed to sit comfortably under the arm, equipped with a detachable gold metal chain and a detachable, adjustable aged natural leather strap. It is signed with a Louis Vuitton-engraved plaque. Size: 24.5 x 13.5 x 6.5 cm.
